## Checklist

- [ ] I have run `bash -n` (and/or PowerShell parser) on every script I touched.
- [ ] I have run `scripts/verify-manifest.sh` (or `.ps1`) if `release.config` changed.
- [ ] I updated `CHANGELOG.md` under `## [Unreleased]` if user-visible.
- [ ] I have not added any new runtime dependencies.
- [ ] I confirm there are no API keys or personal tokens in the diff.
